name: PDD Holdings
confidenceReason: Incredible growth and cash flow, but severe geopolitical and regulatory risks.
bullCase: Temu's global hyper-expansion successfully disrupts Amazon and local e-commerce worldwide, driving unprecedented cash generation at scale.
bearCase: Geopolitical tariffs, cross-border tax loop closures, and Chinese regulatory unpredictability crush the terminal value.

screener.note: Cheap (0.46) but base CAGR 13% misses the 14% hurdle
